headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 20, 2026**
article:
The Washington Nationals took down the San Francisco Giants 3-0, with Curtis Mead leading the Giants' offense with a home run and two RBIs. In other action, the Pittsburgh Pirates secured a 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Mitch Keller pitching 7.0 innings and allowing 2 earned runs. Junior Caminero led the Pirates' offense with a home run and 1 RBI.

Several players have been impacted by injuries and availability. The Houston Astros have placed left fielder Joey Loperfido on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 18, 2026, due to a right quad strain. The Kansas City Royals transferred RHP James McArthur from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation.

The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake in a trade with the New York Yankees. Shewmake joins the Astros after being dealt for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Chayce McDermott, while the New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers.

top_news.title: **Giants Fall Short in Nation's Capital**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals took down the San Francisco Giants 3-0, handing them a tough loss. Curtis Mead led the Giants' offense with a home run and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Pirates Take Down Rays 6-3**
top_news.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates secured a 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Mitch Keller pitching 7.0 innings and allowing 2 earned runs. Junior Caminero led the Pirates' offense with a home run and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall to Yankees in Dominant 7-0 Loss**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees took control of the game with a strong performance, securing a 7-0 victory over the Kansas City Royals. Ryan Weathers led the way for the Yankees, pitching 7.1 innings with 8 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Fall to Guardians in 8-4 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles suffered a tough defeat at the hands of the Cleveland Guardians, who won 8-4. José Ramírez led the Guardians' offense with two home runs and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Astros Place Joey Loperfido on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros have placed left fielder Joey Loperfido on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 18, 2026, due to a right quad strain.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake in a trade with the New York Yankees. Shewmake joins the Astros after being dealt for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez.
